meaning: n.涓嬪眰涓涙灄,鐢熶簬澶ф爲涓嬬殑鐭爲,鍙戣偛涓嶅叏
examples: We had to bushwhack through undergrowth.
The tiger prowled through the undergrowth.
There was a sudden movement in the undergrowth.
Hugh O'Brien-Quinn, prosecuting, said Parkes' wife Jane lay cowering in the undergrowth with the family's dog.
He stops the car and rummages in the undergrowth, emerging with an armful of plants.
